title: Smart Graves
description: A grave block spawns when you die, keeping all your items and XP safe until you come back for them. Your coordinates are shown in chat so you always know where to find it.
body:
# Smart Graves

Tired of losing all your items when you die? Smart Graves places a grave 
at your death location that holds every item and all your XP until you 
come back for it.

## Features

- A grave block spawns at your exact death location
- All your items and XP are stored safely inside
- Only **you** can open your own grave
- Operators can open any grave if needed
- The grave tells you the coordinates when you respawn
- Items drop on the ground if the grave is broken by force
- Works on servers and singleplayer

## How to use

1. Die (hopefully not too far from home)
2. Check chat — it will show you the grave coordinates
3. Travel back and **right-click** your grave
4. All your items and XP are returned instantly

## Compatibility

- Fabric 1.21.11
- Requires Fabric API
